description: Advanced multi-entity filter popup. Triggered by a Filter button (top-right of content area). Contains three panels: entity graph canvas, attribute selection, and values selection.

trigger.placement: top-right of content sub-header, adjacent to Export
trigger.label: Filter

entity_canvas.connections: SVG dashed lines between center entity and linked entities (stroke-dasharray:4 4)

attribute_selection.subheader: entity label (accent color, uppercase 11px) + section title 'Attribute Selection'
attribute_selection.search_input: height:28px, border-radius:8px, left search icon, focus ring on accent

option_states.selected: background:var(--ctrl-selected-bg), border-left-color:var(--shell-accent), dot indicator on right

attribute_selection.input_type: radio (one attribute at a time per entity)

header.title: 'Values' 12px 600
header.upload_button: Upload Values — border, accent text, 44px radius
header.include_exclude_toggle: segmented control, active tab = shell-accent bg + white text, position:margin-left:auto

controls_bar.sort_button: right-aligned, Sort by: A-Z / Z-A toggle, 44px radius border

item_states.checked: background:var(--shell-accent), border-color:var(--shell-accent), white checkmark SVG inside

footer.left: Add/Hide Entity button — ds-btn sz-sm t-tertiary with + icon
footer.layout: flex, spacer between left and right

interactions.open: Filter button click → overlay.open class → popup visible
interactions.entity_select: clicking entity node → repopulate attribute list → clear value panel
interactions.attr_select: clicking attribute → repopulate values grid with that attribute's values
interactions.value_toggle: clicking value row → toggle ds-filter-value-checkbox checked state
interactions.select_all: checkbox toggles all values in current attribute
interactions.sort: toggles A-Z / Z-A, re-renders values grid
interactions.inc_exc: sets global include/exclude mode for this filter session
interactions.apply: collects all checked values → renders ds-active-filters-bar chips → closes popup → auto-dismiss success toast (3s)
interactions.clear_all: clears checkedValues state and appliedFilters → hides bar → info toast (3s)
interactions.remove_chip: removes single value from appliedFilters, updates bar

do: Always place Filter button in the sub-header top-right, adjacent to Export.
Use entity-graph canvas as leftmost panel — never a flat list.
Show attribute panel only after entity is selected.
Use 2-column grid for values when 4+ values; single column below 4.
Include/Exclude toggle applies to the entire current filter session.
Active filters bar appears immediately below sub-header when filters are applied.
Success toast auto-dismisses at 3 seconds. Info/error toasts also auto-dismiss at 3 seconds.
Draw SVG dashed connection lines from center entity to all linked entities.
Close popup on Escape key and backdrop click.
dont: Never use a simple dropdown instead of the full popup for multi-entity filtering.
Never hide entity graph — it must always show at least one node.
Never use radio buttons for values — values always use checkboxes (multi-select).
Never use radio buttons for inc/exc — use the segmented button control.
Never show values panel without an attribute selected.
Never apply filters without the Apply button — never auto-apply on check.
